Cultural.rationale: Moderate cultural nationalism; acceptance of controlled immigration balanced with integration. To be documented.

Military.rationale: Continued support for NATO and Western alliances, pragmatic on EU defence cooperation. To be documented.

Sovereignty.rationale: Acceptance of Brexit outcome but with significant continued regulatory alignment and shared institutions. To be documented.

Economic.rationale: Desire to maintain close economic ties with EU, possibly via customs union or single market alignment. To be documented.

Class.rationale: Concerned about economic impact on workers; emphasis on protecting labour rights post-Brexit. To be documented.

Governance.rationale: Moderate libertarian streak; emphasis on parliamentary process and rule of law in Brexit implementation. To be documented.
